top_signals.title: Gold Holds Gain as Traders Weigh Impact of Oil Risks on Rates
top_signals.summary: Gold held a gain as traders monitored threats to energy supply routes that risk stoking inflation and putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to hike interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Tankers with Saudi crude turn back as Houthis open new front in U.S.-Iran war
top_signals.summary: The Houthis, who control much of Yemen including the coast at the mouth of the Red ‌Sea, announced ‌a naval blockade on Saudi Arabia on Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Why the world trusts China more than America
top_signals.summary: Countries suspicious of the US are to be found on every continent, not just in its own back yard
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
